variants.name: 回声使
variants.ability: 每个夜晚，你要选择两名玩家（包括至少一名善良玩家）：明天第一名玩家要“疯狂”地证明第二名玩家的言论是正确的，不然他可能被处决。
variants.firstNightReminder: The Echomancer chooses 2 players: they learn that the Echomancer chose them and who their echo is.
variants.otherNightReminder: The Echomancer chooses 2 players: they learn that the Echomancer chose them and who their echo is.
variants.flavor: 观点？你在说什么？现实无非是看谁鬼话连篇！
